title: Amtech N2376 Thermal Work Gloves Large (Size 9), Certified Quality for Heavy Duty Tasks, Hi-Vis Yellow
features: DURABLE: These high visibility, 10 gauge cotton/polyester thermal work gloves have tough latex coated palms with black crinkled palms for an excellent grip
These large size site gloves are 10 gauge premium quality and feature thermal insulation for working in cold conditions.
The Amtech N2376 winter gloves are officially size 9, and benefit from a black latex crinkle finish for excellent handling.

Please note that these safety gloves are CE Complaint, indicating that they conform with health, safety, and environmental protection standards for products sold within the European Economic Area (EEA).
This range of work gloves are available in Medium Size 8 (Amtech N2377), Large Size 9 (Amtech N2376) and Extra-Large Size 10 (Amtech N2375)
description: Product Description The Amtech heavy-duty latex gloves are of certified quality, meaning that they meet EU standards for health, safety, and environmental protection. Ideal for a broad range of DIY and Construction tasks, as well as other uses. Features a black latex crinkle finish for excellent handling and thermal insulation for cold conditions. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your safety & workwear requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
